Appearances:
Plaintiff, Bessie Chan is present. Represented by Harold Wong
Attorney, Howard Chung, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Jeffrey Wayman, is present.
Attorney, Brenda Posada , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Deborah Schweizer, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUN-01-2010 is vacated.
